name: IGC Pharma, Inc.
business: IGC Pharma is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company developing treatments for Alzheimer's disease and related neurodegenerative conditions. It sells an investigational drug candidate (IGC-AD1) in Phase 2 trials, white-label manufactured formulations, and wellness products.

exposures.sentence: Our lead investigational drug, IGC-AD1, has progressed through preclinical evaluations and a successful Phase 1 safety trial, and is currently being evaluated in a multicenter, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled Phase 2 clinical trial, officially named CALMA (Calming Agitation in Alzheimer's).
Currently, the AI team is working on developing a Multimodal Interpretable Transformer for Alzheimer's Disease (MINT-AD).
We have a cybersecurity policy in place and have implemented tighter cybersecurity measures to safeguard against hackers.

catalysts.event: Additional data readouts from CALMA Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates additional data readouts from the CALMA trial in late 2025, including further analysis of sleep-related outcomes.

catalysts.event: Extension of credit agreement with O-Bank
catalysts.sentence: On June 24, 2025, IGC Pharma, Inc. entered into an amendment to extend its existing Master Loan and Security Agreement along with the General Banking Facility Letter (collectively called the Loan Agreement ) with O-Bank, CO., LTD., a banking corporation incorporated under the laws of Taiwan, as administrative agent and lender (the Lender ), effective June 24, 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Global sleep aid market projected to exceed $100 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: If the sleep-related benefits of IGC-AD1 are confirmed in larger clinical trials, the candidate may address a significant unmet need within the broader global sleep aid market, which is projected to exceed $100 billion by 2030.
